description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AMR-Wind Docs that triggers on pushes to the development branch and on pull requests to development, but only for files in amr-wind, docs, and .github/workflows/docs.yml. Run a job on ubuntu-latest that cancels previous runs, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.x, installs dependencies including doxygen, graphviz, sphinx, and sphinx_rtd_theme, builds documentation with sphinx-build and doxygen, and deploys to gh-pages if the event is a push.
